headline: Omnicom Declares Dividend
summary: NEW YORK, May 5, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of Omnicom declared a quarterly dividend of 80 cents per outstanding share of the corporation's common stock. The dividend is payable...

headline: A Look At Omnicom Group (OMC) Valuation After Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: Omnicom Group stock overview Omnicom Group (OMC) is back on investor screens after recent trading, with the stock last closing at US$76.27. The company operates in global advertising and marketing services, with operations across North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Latin America, and the Middle East & Africa.
